mission: Scaffold the canonical Vecells Phase 0 monorepo with pnpm plus Nx, buildable placeholder apps, service skeletons, shared packages, and a foundation gallery that makes shell ownership visible from day one.

non_workspace_entries.workspace_reason: Existing validated docs and Python control roots stay outside pnpm workspace while remaining canonical.
Existing validated docs and Python control roots stay outside pnpm workspace while remaining canonical.
Existing validated docs and Python control roots stay outside pnpm workspace while remaining canonical.

shells.title: Quiet entry, clear next step, no implied truth.
shells.description: Premium calm-entry placeholder that proves continuity, spotlight posture, and route ownership without pretending to own lifecycle authority.

metrics.label: Continuity ribbon
metrics.detail: Secure-link and embedded parity stay visible.

metrics.label: Next step card
metrics.detail: Only one obvious patient action is promoted.

metrics.label: Publication posture
metrics.detail: Derived entry routes remain explicit watch items.

cards.title: Claim and continuity stay visible
cards.body: The shell keeps claim origin, secure-link recovery, and embedded reuse in one exact ribbon.
cards.footnote: No patient shell card claims write ownership.

cards.title: Next-step card stays singular
cards.body: One promoted task keeps the journey quiet while the route family inventory remains inspectable.
cards.footnote: Primary controls stay 44px or larger.

cards.title: Continuity diagram never hides parity
cards.body: Every visual cue has a parity list so support and audit can read it without relying on the diagram.
cards.footnote: Reduced motion falls back to still panels.

visualRows.label: Claim
visualRows.detail: Entry origin remains attached to the shell.

visualRows.label: Resume
visualRows.detail: Home inherits the same continuity key.

visualRows.label: Settle
visualRows.detail: Destination routes stay explicit and inspectable.

parityRows: Entry lineage must survive shell transitions.
One promoted action prevents navigation drift.
Visuals never become the only source of meaning.

shells.title: Queue on the left, decision dock on the right, settlement never buried.
shells.description: Operational workspace placeholder that keeps review, decision, and settlement explicit while leaving live command truth to later service tasks.

metrics.label: Review lane
metrics.detail: Review, decide, settle stay pinned.

metrics.label: Checkpoint
metrics.detail: A human checkpoint remains first-class.

metrics.label: Assistive seam
metrics.detail: Assistive residency is explicit, not implied.

cards.title: Queue rail keeps provenance tight
cards.body: Each row keeps intake origin, safety posture, and current reviewer before any action is suggested.
cards.footnote: Arrow keys move through the queue with no hidden focus.

cards.title: Decision context is anchored
cards.body: The right dock holds evidence, manual checkpoint state, and settlement posture in one place.
cards.footnote: Dock panels stay readable at tablet and mobile widths.

cards.title: Review -> decision -> settlement lane
cards.body: The lane diagram remains adjacent to a parity list so automation and accessibility can inspect each stop.
cards.footnote: No lane implies automatic write execution.

visualRows.label: Review
visualRows.detail: Intake provenance and safety notes remain visible.

visualRows.label: Decision
visualRows.detail: A named reviewer confirms before mutation.

visualRows.label: Settlement
visualRows.detail: Only downstream services own actual command writes.

parityRows: Review context must remain inspectable before any decision.
Approval state stays explicit and attributable.
The shell surfaces status without claiming command truth.

shells.title: A coordination lane with alternatives kept side by side instead of hidden in menus.
shells.description: Hub placeholder shell that makes cross-site coordination, alternatives, and acknowledgement posture explicit inside one controlled workspace.

metrics.label: Coordination lane
metrics.detail: Case, alternative, acknowledgement, settle.

metrics.label: Alternative strip
metrics.detail: Primary and fallback remain side by side.

metrics.label: Evidence posture
metrics.detail: No route implies confirmation without proof.

cards.title: Case state stays linear
cards.body: The lane keeps origin, alternative, acknowledgement, and settlement aligned for the operator.
cards.footnote: Comparison never displaces the main case.

cards.title: Comparison strip stays visible
cards.body: Primary and fallback sites are compared in a narrow strip so tradeoffs are obvious.
cards.footnote: No hidden tab owns the fallback story.

cards.title: Acknowledgement posture remains named
cards.body: The shell keeps who accepted, what changed, and which contract moved next.
cards.footnote: Acknowledgement is not inferred from page exit.

visualRows.label: Case
visualRows.detail: Inbound context and route family stay pinned.

visualRows.label: Alternative
visualRows.detail: Fallback sites appear beside the primary option.

visualRows.label: Acknowledge
visualRows.detail: Acknowledgement proof stays attributable.

parityRows: Operators keep one stable context anchor.

shells.title: Validation cards, consent and proof chips, and provider choice kept in one exact rail.
shells.description: Pharmacy placeholder shell that favors validation clarity over decorative dashboard treatment and keeps provider-choice evidence explicit.

metrics.label: Validation cards
metrics.detail: Consent, proof, dispatch readiness.

metrics.label: Provider rail
metrics.detail: Primary and alternative supplier stay visible.

metrics.label: Proof chips
metrics.detail: Compact chips stay readable without crowding.

cards.title: Consent and proof sit together
cards.body: Validation cards hold consent posture and proof freshness in one exact frame.
cards.footnote: Proof never drifts behind a hidden modal.

cards.title: Choice rail stays narrow and explicit
cards.body: Provider candidates remain visible so dispatch choices can be compared without losing context.
cards.footnote: Choice does not imply dispatch authority.

cards.title: Dispatch readiness remains stated, not assumed
cards.body: The placeholder shows validation status while real dispatch truth waits for later service work.
cards.footnote: Live provider actions remain gated elsewhere.

visualRows.label: Consent
visualRows.detail: Named approval is present and current.

visualRows.label: Proof
visualRows.detail: Evidence freshness is explicit before provider moves.

visualRows.label: Choice
visualRows.detail: Primary and fallback providers remain visible.

parityRows: A dispatch move cannot proceed without it.
The shell keeps freshness visible beside choice.
Operators can compare primary and fallback without context loss.

shells.title: Ticket timeline, masked subject card, and replay return strip in one durable shell.
shells.description: Support placeholder shell that keeps replay posture and masked subject details visible without overloading the operator with dashboard noise.

metrics.label: Replay steps
metrics.detail: Open, observe, return remain linear.

metrics.label: Masked card
metrics.detail: Masked identity stays clear without overexposure.

metrics.label: Assist posture
metrics.detail: Support moves stay attributable.

cards.title: Ticket history stays linear
cards.body: The timeline keeps ticket origin, current state, and last replay point visible in one column.
cards.footnote: No hidden accordion owns the replay story.

cards.title: Subject card is restrained and safe
cards.body: The subject panel shows only the information a support operator needs at this stage.
cards.footnote: Masking remains visible rather than assumed.

cards.title: Replay always has a return path
cards.body: A narrow strip keeps the operator anchored to where they can safely return after observation.
cards.footnote: Replay never becomes a dead end.

visualRows.label: Open
visualRows.detail: Case family and masked subject remain adjacent.

visualRows.label: Observe
visualRows.detail: Replay context never hides the return target.

visualRows.label: Return
visualRows.detail: The operator always has a clear next safe action.

parityRows: Operators keep case provenance while helping users.
Observation never hides the next safe action.
Support work remains recoverable after replay.

shells.title: A telemetry strip, a compact heat map, and table parity beside every signal.
shells.description: Operations placeholder shell that foregrounds fleet posture, intervention thresholds, and parity tables while staying visually restrained.

metrics.label: Active watch tuples
metrics.detail: Only the highest-signal tuples surface in the strip.

metrics.label: Intervention posture
metrics.detail: Actions remain behind explicit release controls.

metrics.label: Heat map cells
metrics.detail: Every cell has a table peer.

cards.title: KPI strip favors legibility
cards.body: Short values, quiet contrast, and exact labels keep the console readable under pressure.
cards.footnote: No gradient-heavy dashboard chrome.

cards.title: Compact heat map holds table parity
cards.body: The visual matrix is restrained and every cell resolves to a plain-language row below it.
cards.footnote: Hot spots never exist without literal labels.

cards.title: Intervention gates stay explicit
cards.body: Operators can see where release control or evidence freshness would block a live move.
cards.footnote: No implied admin override exists in the placeholder.

visualRows.label: Patient home
visualRows.detail: Continuity and publication remain within tolerance.

visualRows.label: Clinical queue
visualRows.detail: Manual checkpoint backlog is above nominal.

visualRows.label: Notifications
visualRows.detail: Retry matrix is healthy but constrained.

shells.title: Policy-ledger cards and a trust tuple strip that stays sober, legible, and exact.
shells.description: Governance placeholder shell that foregrounds policy state, release freeze posture, and trust tuples without collapsing into admin clutter.

metrics.label: Ledger cards
metrics.detail: Policy, release, access, and communication stay separated.

metrics.label: Trust tuples
metrics.detail: Tuple evidence stays in a single strip.

metrics.label: Freeze posture
metrics.detail: Release freeze never hides behind an icon.

cards.title: Policy cards keep control planes separated
cards.body: Governance cards present release, access, messaging, and evidence posture without blending categories.
cards.footnote: Each card stays legible at mobile widths.

cards.title: Release freeze stays literal
cards.body: The freeze strip states whether change is blocked, scoped, or being reviewed for promotion.
cards.footnote: No ambiguous badge stands in for release law.

cards.title: Tuple strip stays adjacent to parity
cards.body: Trust tuples have a neighboring table so automation and reviewers can verify what each tuple means.
cards.footnote: Tuple visuals never become the only explanation.

visualRows.label: Release
visualRows.detail: The scope of freeze is written, not implied.

visualRows.label: Access
visualRows.detail: Named reviewer remains part of the tuple.

visualRows.label: Evidence
visualRows.detail: Evidence freshness and publication state stay visible.

railItems.title: Tuple parity
railItems.detail: trust tuples mirrored in table form

parityRows: Promotion law cannot hide in decoration.
Audit posture depends on visible freshness.
